email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar het Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek bij Page Personnel Belgium. Uw oproep voor een leergierige en hands-on trainee sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

Hoewel mijn achtergrond in digitale marketing ligt, heb ik via mijn ervaring bij Katoen Natie (warehouse & logistiek) een solide basis in logistieke processen opgedaan. Ik ben nauwkeurig, organisatorisch sterk en gewend om in een snelle omgeving te werken. Mijn analytische vaardigheden (SEO, data-analyse) en communicatieve vaardigheden in Nederlands en Engels maken mij geschikt voor klantcontact en dossierbeheer.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mij via dit traineeship te ontwikkelen in de logistiek en bij te dragen aan uw team. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen).

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek at Page Personnel Belgium. Your call for a eager-to-learn and hands-on trainee aligns perfectly with my profile.

Although my background is in digital marketing, my experience at Katoen Natie (warehouse & logistics) gave me a solid foundation in logistics processes. I am accurate, organized, and used to working in a fast-paced environment. My analytical skills (SEO, data analysis) and communication skills in Dutch and English make me suitable for customer contact and file management.

I am motivated to develop myself in logistics through this traineeship and contribute to your team. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons).

I would be happy to explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek. Uw omschrijving van een dynamische, internationale omgeving waar jonge talenten worden opgeleid en gestimuleerd om initiatief te nemen, spreekt mij enorm aan.

Mijn motivatie voor deze functie komt voort uit een combinatie van praktijkervaring in logistiek en een analytische, klantgerichte instelling. Bij Katoen Natie werkte ik in een hoogvolume magazijnomgeving, waar ik nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie combineerde in een snel tempo. Deze ervaring leerde me het belang van gestructureerde processen en teamwork. Daarnaast heb ik als junior digital marketer bij Episto geleerd om complexe dossiers te beheren, data te analyseren (Google Analytics, SEMrush) en helder te communiceren met klanten en interne teams. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling en SEO heeft mijn probleemoplossend vermogen en oog voor detail versterkt.

Ik herken me in het profiel: ik ben leergierig, proactief en hands-on. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg actief lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Uw traineeship biedt precies de begeleiding en groeikansen die ik zoek om mij te specialiseren in logistieke processen, van inbound/outbound flows tot klantendossiers en optimalisaties.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek. Your description of a dynamic, international environment where young talents are trained and encouraged to take initiative appeals to me greatly.

My motivation for this role comes from a combination of practical logistics experience and an analytical, customer-oriented mindset. At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume warehouse environment, combining accuracy and efficiency in a fast pace. This experience taught me the importance of structured processes and teamwork. Additionally, as a junior digital marketer at Episto, I learned to manage complex files, analyze data (Google Analytics, SEMrush), and communicate clearly with clients and internal teams. My technical background in web development and SEO has strengthened my problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

I recognize myself in the profile: I am eager to learn, proactive, and hands-on. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am actively taking lessons to improve further. Your traineeship offers exactly the guidance and growth opportunities I am looking for to specialize in logistics processes, from inbound/outbound flows to customer files and optimizations.

I look forward to explaining my motivation and skills in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Warehouse & logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026): accuracy and efficiency in high-volume environment
• Analytical skills: data analysis, reporting (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs) – transferable to logistics data and claims
• Strong communication in Dutch (B1, actively improving) and English (professional) – suitable for client and internal communication
• Proactive, hands-on, and eager to learn: built and optimized websites independently (mirook.com)
• Organized and detail-oriented: managed multiple client projects and deadlines at Episto
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on logistics experience and strong analytical skills, eager to grow in customer operations and supply chain. At Katoen Natie, I worked accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced warehouse environment. In my digital marketing role, I managed client files, analyzed data, and communicated clearly with stakeholders. I am organized, proactive, and quick to learn new processes. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Logistics & operations: warehouse operations, accuracy, efficiency, process adherence
- Customer & communication: client communication (Dutch & English), file management, problem-solving
- Data & analysis: data tracking, reporting, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- Organization: multitasking, attention to detail, deadline-driven
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Managed client websites and content, ensuring timely updates and accuracy
- Analyzed site performance data (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics) to guide decisions
- Communicated with clients to understand needs and deliver solutions
- Coordinated multiple projects simultaneously, meeting deadlines

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Followed strict processes for inbound/outbound flows
- Collaborated with team members to ensure smooth operations

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site: full site structure, content management, and social media integration
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve search visibility
- Ran iterative audits to raise search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
